text: Box arrived completely crushed. Aramex driver did not even ring the bell, just left it at reception. Had to argue with Mumzworld customer service for a refund on the dented packaging.
Delivery took 9 days when the listing said 2 to 3. Completely unacceptable for express shipping. Will not order from this seller again.
Five stars to the delivery person, super polite, brought it up to my flat personally. The baby was entertained for a good while.
Wrong product shipped entirely. I ordered the musical mobile for the nursery and got something else. The returns process with Mumzworld took two weeks to resolve.
Mumzworld used excessive plastic packaging for such a small item. Three layers of bubble wrap for no reason. Very wasteful.
Cash on delivery agent in Dubai Marina was rude and extremely impatient. Two stars are entirely for that poor service experience. Have not even opened the box yet.
وصلت الطلبية متأخرة 5 أيام، صندوق التغليف مكسور. خدمة العملاء ما ردّت إلا بعد 3 أيام. الخدمة سيئة جدًا.
الضوء والأنغام لطيفة وتشد انتباه بنتي. خفيفة الوزن وسهلة الحمل في الشنطة.
أرامكس ما اتصل ولا أرسل رسالة، طلع الطرد عند الاستقبال. حسيت إن الخدمة من ممزورلد تراجعت هالفترة.
وصلني المنتج خطأ، طلبت شيء ووصلتني بضاعة مختلفة. عملية الإرجاع أخذت أسبوعين. مو راضية عن التجربة.
Baby loves the lights and the music. Nice sensory stimulation. Would buy again.
التوصيل تأخر بس الموسيقى مش مزعجة والألوان جذابة للأطفال.
Mumzworld customer service used to be fast. This time I waited 4 days for a reply about a refund. Very disappointed.
التغليف مقبول بس وقت التوصيل كان سيء جدًا. ما توقعت من ممزورلد هذا التأخير.
Refund process is a complete nightmare. Multiple emails, no resolution in sight. Stay away from this particular seller.
